assessment.roster_rule: live mode uses current roster/stat/injury APIs only

game_assessment.roster_rule: live mode uses current roster/stat/injury APIs only

away.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Jordan Harrison
players.injury_comment: Harrison saw action in the 98-83 loss to Chicago to open the season. Since then, she hasn't been on the floor. Harrison is signed to a developmental deal, limiting her to 12 regular-season appearances, so she will sit this one out to preserve her eligibility moving forward.

players.name: Serah Williams
players.injury_comment: Williams will be held out of Sunday's contest while battling an illness, and she'll look to recover enough in time for Thursday's home game against the Aces. The rookie is averaging 11.7 minutes per game off the bench this season, and that playing time will be absorbed by Luisa Geiselsoder and Megan Gustafson.
